name: Great Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350°F.
Grease a Bundt cake pan.
Cook the pudding according to package directions.
Combine the cake mix, eggs, sour cream, and hot pudding in a large bowl. Beat until smooth.
Fold in chocolate chips.
Transfer batter to the Bundt pan and bake for 50-55 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Cool in the Bundt pan for 5 minutes before inverting onto a wire rack.
Frost with additional chocolate or dust with powdered sugar.
